system.description:
### Tier 2 Bruiser A massive reptilian warrior with redundant organs and heavy armor, charging headfirst into battle. Motives & Tactics: Charge, headbutt, soak damage, regenerate, refuse to die

#### Features Redundant Organs - Passive: When the Krogan Warrior should mark HP, they may mark 1 Stress instead.

Krogan Charge - Action: Spend a fear to move the Krogan to a target within Far range and to make a Melee attack. On a success, the target takes +1d8 phy damage.

Blood Rage - Reaction: When the Krogan is at 3 HP or less, they gain Advantage on all Melee attacks and deal +5 damage, but they cannot use Ranged attacks.

}}
